'''fafudhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:drabbletail|drabbletail]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-f-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:drabbletail|drabbletail]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| fafudhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæfidhith|fæfidhith]] || [[word:fæfidhij|fæfidhij]] || [[word:fæfidhish|fæfidhish]] || [[word:fæfidhi|fæfidhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fafufudhuth|fafufudhuth]] || [[word:fafufudhuj|fafufudhuj]] || [[word:fafufudhush|fafufudhush]] || [[word:fafufudhu|fafufudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fafudhuth|fafudhuth]] || [[word:fafudhuj|fafudhuj]] || [[word:fafudhush|fafudhush]] || [[word:fafudhu|fafudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fafufdhuth|fafufdhuth]] || [[word:fafufdhuj|fafufdhuj]] || [[word:fafufdhush|fafufdhush]] || [[word:fafufdhuf|fafufdhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fafudhuthu|fafudhuthu]] || [[word:fafudhuju|fafudhuju]] || [[word:fafudhushu|fafudhushu]] || [[word:fafudhuku|fafudhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fafudhuth|fafudhuth]] || [[word:fafudhuj|fafudhuj]] || [[word:fafudhush|fafudhush]] || [[word:fafudhu|fafudhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fafudhuthul|fafudhuthul]] || [[word:fafudhujul|fafudhujul]] || [[word:fafudhushul|fafudhushul]] || [[word:fafudhukul|fafudhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fafudhuthuthu|fafudhuthuthu]] || [[word:fafudhujuju|fafudhujuju]] || [[word:fafudhushushu|fafudhushushu]] || [[word:fafudhuku|fafudhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fafudhuthun|fafudhuthun]] || [[word:fafudhujun|fafudhujun]] || [[word:fafudhushun|fafudhushun]] || [[word:fafudhukun|fafudhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fafudhuthuoro|fafudhuthuoro]] || [[word:fafudhujuoro|fafudhujuoro]] || [[word:fafudhushuoro|fafudhushuoro]] || [[word:fafudhukuoro|fafudhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
